title: Command Builder Library
description: A library of board command 'books' for droidnet-command-library. Each component is a board (or a WCB verb book); each command declares how a structured step encodes to a wire string.

$schema.description: Schema identifier. Use 'droidnet-command-library/library/v1' or a URL to this file.

libraryVersion.description: Semantic version of THIS library's contents. The 'Update Library' flow compares this to decide whether a newer library is available.

generatedFrom.description: Free-text provenance note (firmware versions, docs, date).

enums.description: Reusable, named value sets referenced by params via param.enum.

components.description: The boards / verb books in this library.

code.description: The literal wire fragment for this choice (may be empty for an 'all/none' broadcast).

label.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI dropdown.

name.description: Display name. The first whitespace-delimited word is used as the board chip label.

kind.description: 'device-native' = the board's own grammar; 'wcb-verb' = a command interpreted by an intermediary (e.g. a WCB) rather than the end device.

confidence.description: Provenance/trust badge. 'high' = verified against firmware/docs; 'community' = contributed, unverified; 'low' = best-effort/experimental.

firmware.description: Firmware version/identifier these commands were derived from.

nativeWrapper.description: How the board wraps commands, e.g. 'none' or 'angle' (<...>).

durationSuffix.description: If the board accepts a trailing duration (e.g. 'A007|60'), describe it here so the engine can append/strip it.

id.description: Unique, stable command id (unique across the whole library).

group.description: Optional grouping label for the UI.

safety.description: Risk class. Anything other than 'cosmetic' raises a confirm-before-firing warning in the UI.

encoder.description: Encoder name. Defaults to 'template'. Custom encoders must be registered via DroidNetCommandLibrary.registerEncoder().

template.description: For the 'template' encoder: a literal string with {param} placeholders. REQUIRED when encoder is 'template' (or omitted).

supportsDuration.description: Whether this command honors the component's routing.durationSuffix.

examples.description: Canonical encoded examples, used by tests and docs.

commentLabel.description: Default *** comment label applied when a fresh step is inserted.

name.description: Placeholder name; must match a {name} in the template (for the template encoder).

enum.description: Name of an entry under top-level 'enums'. Renders as a dropdown.

type.description: Non-enum value type. 'int' renders a number input.

default.description: Default code/value used when the param is left blank. Strings for enum codes; numbers are accepted for int params.

pad.description: Zero-pad a numeric value to this fixed width (e.g. 4 → '0025').
